name: Lufthansa

carryOn.notes: Economy: 1 carry-on (8 kg) + 1 laptop bag. Business/First: 2 carry-on bags up to 16 kg total.

economy.notes: Included in Economy Classic and Flex. Economy Light does not include checked baggage.

fees.firstBag: Included in Classic/Flex; Economy Light requires purchase

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Spare lithium-ion batteries must be carried in hand baggage only
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Hand baggage only. Up to 100Wh no restrictions. 101–160Wh requires Lufthansa approval. Over 160Wh prohibited.
batteryRules.laptops: Permitted in carry-on. Comply with security screening.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with integrated non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: Does Lufthansa Economy Light include a checked bag?
faqs.answer: No. Lufthansa Economy Light (the cheapest fare) does not include a checked bag. Economy Classic and Flex fares include one 23 kg checked bag. Business class includes two 32 kg bags.

faqs.question: What is Lufthansa's carry-on weight limit?
faqs.answer: Lufthansa allows one carry-on bag up to 8 kg (18 lbs) and one laptop bag in Economy. Business class passengers may bring two carry-on items totaling up to 16 kg.

faqs.question: Are power banks allowed on Lufthansa flights?
faqs.answer: Yes, in hand baggage only. Power banks up to 100Wh are unrestricted. Banks between 101–160Wh require Lufthansa approval. Power banks over 160Wh are not allowed on board.
